title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Rhenus Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Rhenus Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
